## How to read this (the F2 rule)

**Rankings exist only WITHIN a cell** `(metric, granularity, input_protocol, reference_dtype, graph_boundary)`, on raw values. There is **no cross-cell 'best'** — a flattened 1600-dim cosine is not comparable to a per-row 14-dim min, and a synthetic-input number is not comparable to a recorded-dataset one (the smolvla 0.02-cosine catastrophe is why `input_protocol` is recorded). A 🚩 marks a waivered pass (e.g. near-zero-action conditioning) — surfaced, never hidden.

Cells with a single entry are listed but not ranked. Absent recipes are either unmeasured (Gate B not_run) or carry no protocol signature yet.
